view.title: Validate explicit UC need #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for different providers per step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that different providers are assigned to each step of the service. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether different providers are indeed utilized for the bleach, tone, and cut steps. The linked use case mentions the need for different providers, but there is no concrete evidence or data to support this requirement, leading to an inconclusive result.
